novigrad.name: Novigrad
novigrad.description: A bustling city of merchants, bards, and political intrigue where the dispute between Sapkowski and the Guild first erupted.
novigrad.inspect_text: The city is filled with whispers of the mountain's treasure and the growing conflict between the two sides.

guild_hall.name: Guild Hall
guild_hall.description: A grand building where the Guild of Red Projects holds its meetings and manages its affairs.
guild_hall.inspect_text: The hall is adorned with banners of the Guild, and there are signs of recent activity and tension.

sapkowski_manor.name: Sapkowski Manor
sapkowski_manor.description: A modest estate where Andrzej Sapkowski resides, surrounded by old stories and forgotten tales.
sapkowski_manor.inspect_text: The manor is quiet, with books and manuscripts scattered around, suggesting a life dedicated to storytelling.

ancient_ruins.name: Ancient Ruins
ancient_ruins.description: A forgotten site near the mountain where ancient relics and spirits are said to dwell.
ancient_ruins.inspect_text: The ruins are overgrown with moss and vines, and there are strange markings on the stones.

mountain_cave.name: Mountain Cave
mountain_cave.description: A dark cave beneath the mountain, where the ancient spirit is said to rest.
mountain_cave.inspect_text: The cave is filled with echoes of greed and ambition, and the air is thick with a cursed energy.

forest_clearing.name: Forest Clearing
forest_clearing.description: A peaceful clearing in the woods where an old storyteller is said to live.
forest_clearing.inspect_text: The clearing is peaceful, with a small hut and a fire pit, and the scent of old stories lingers.

royal_palace.name: Royal Palace
royal_palace.description: The seat of power where kings debate the fate of the mountain's gold.
royal_palace.inspect_text: The palace is grand and filled with the weight of decisions that could change the fate of the continent.

witcher_guild_hall.name: Witcher Guild Hall
witcher_guild_hall.description: A hidden place where witchers gather to take on contracts and discuss their work.
witcher_guild_hall.inspect_text: The hall is filled with maps, weapons, and the scent of adventure and danger.

negotiator_note.name: Negotiator Note
negotiator_note.description: A note detailing the missing negotiators and their last known whereabouts.

ancient_relic.name: Ancient Relic
ancient_relic.description: A relic found in the ruins that holds the power to awaken the mountain's spirit.

storyteller_journal.name: Storyteller Journal
storyteller_journal.description: A journal containing the pact between Sapkowski and the Guild.

golden_contract.name: Golden Contract
golden_contract.description: A contract signed by both parties, outlining their agreement over the stories.

spirit_soul.name: Spirit Soul
spirit_soul.description: A fragment of the ancient spirit's essence, corrupted by greed.

witcher_sigil.name: Witcher Sigil
witcher_sigil.description: A symbol of the witcher's authority and protection.

mountain_whisper.name: Mountain Whisper
mountain_whisper.description: A mysterious artifact that whispers promises of gold to those who listen.

mysterious_client.name: Mysterious Client
mysterious_client.description: A shadowy figure who hires the witcher to investigate the disappearances.

dialogue.default: The mountain's whispers are growing louder. You must uncover the truth before it's too late.
dialogue.after_key: You have the key to the truth. The mountain will not rest until its gold is claimed.

guild_representative.name: Guild Representative
guild_representative.description: A confident and calculating negotiator representing the Guild of Red Projects.

dialogue.default: The stories belong to the world, not to one man. We built the legend.
dialogue.after_key: You have seen the pact. The stories are ours, and the gold is ours to claim.

sapkowski.name: Andrzej Sapkowski
sapkowski.description: A renowned author who created the world of witchers and monsters.

dialogue.default: The mountain would not exist without the stories I created. The legacy is mine.
dialogue.after_key: You have seen the truth. The stories are mine, and the mountain is mine.

old_storyteller.name: Old Storyteller
old_storyteller.description: An ancient figure who knows the truth behind the pact and the mountain's curse.

dialogue.default: The pact was made long ago. The mountain feeds on greed, and it will not stop.
dialogue.after_key: The stories are not yours to claim. The mountain's whisper will never end.

king_of_novigrad.name: King of Novigrad
king_of_novigrad.description: A ruler who seeks control over the mountain's gold.

dialogue.default: The gold must be under my control. The kingdom needs it.
dialogue.after_key: You have seen the truth. The gold is mine, and the mountain will serve me.

witcher_master.name: Witcher Master
witcher_master.description: The leader of the witcher guild who oversees the investigation.

dialogue.default: The mountain's curse is real. You must choose your path wisely.
dialogue.after_key: The choice is yours. The mountain's whisper will always call to those who seek gold.
